headline: Entergy Strengthens Growth Through Nuclear and Grid Investments
summary: ETR leans on its nuclear portfolio and a $57 billion grid plan to drive demand and reliability, but regulatory risks and efficiency trends persist.

headline: Assessing PG&E (PCG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Conflicting Fair Value Signals
summary: PG&E stock performance snapshot PG&E (PCG) has drawn fresh attention as investors reassess the utility after recent share price moves. The stock closed at $16.60, with performance mixed over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for PG&E. The recent share price pullback, including a 1-day share price return that declined 1.25% and a 30-day share price return down 6.43%, contrasts with a 5-year total shareholder return of 59.93%, so shorter term momentum currently looks...
